name: HubSpot
raw_text: ___ We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our Cookie Policy. Accept All Decline All Manage Cookies Skip to content English Select a language Customer Support Contact Sales Log in About About Products Products Solutions Solutions Pricing Resources Resources Get started Platform Solutions Customer Platform Free Tools Create a Bundle HubSpot for Marketers Products Smart CRM Marketing Sales Service Content Data Commerce Enhancements HubSpot Credits SGD (S$) Save up to 40% off Starter Smarter tools, lower price. Get Starter now: SGD 13/mo (was SGD 21) billed annually, or SGD 21/mo (was SGD 28) billed monthly. New customers only. This offer has no set end date, and may be discontinued at any time. Act soon to secure these savings. Marketing Hub Generate leads and automate marketing that drives growthCalculate your price Free Start generating and emailing new leads, and measuring your success — for free SGD 0/mo No credit card required Get started free Starter Essential marketing, sales, service, content, and data management software Starts at SGD 13/mo/seat SGD 28/mo/seat Pay Monthly Commit monthly Pay Annually BEST VALUE Buy now 500 HubSpot Credits 1,000 marketing contacts Professional Marketing automation, analytics, and campaigns for scalable demand generation Starts at SGD 1,120/mo SGD 1,246/mo Includes 3 Core Seats Additional Core Seats start at SGD 63/mo Pay Monthly Commit annually Pay Annually BEST VALUE Talk to Sales 3,000 HubSpot Credits 2,000 marketing contacts *Cost shown does not include the required, one-time Professional Onboarding for a fee of SGD 4,200. Learn more Enterprise Advanced marketing automation, data, and governance to scale and accelerate revenue growth Starts at SGD 5,100/mo Includes 5 Core Seats Additional Core Seats start at SGD 105/mo Talk to Sales 5,000 HubSpot Credits 10,000 marketing contacts *Cost shown does not include the required, one-time Enterprise Onboarding for a fee of SGD 9,800. Learn more View Professional & Enterprise plans What should I choose? Starter is best for: feature available Teams moving beyond free tools to run consistent email campaigns feature available Businesses with an existing audience and basic engagement needs feature available Marketers who want simple reporting without added complexity Upgrade to Starter when: feature available Free tools no longer meet your email or branding needs feature available You need basic performance tracking and reliability feature available You want a more professional marketing foundation Professional is best for: feature available Teams actively generating demand across multiple channels feature available Marketers who need automation to qualify and nurture leads feature available Sales teams that rely on marketing to create pipeline Upgrade to Professional when: feature available You want to know where new contacts are coming from feature available You need automation to route and qualify leads feature available You’re asked to show how marketing contributes to sales Enterprise is best for: feature available Organizations running complex, data-driven customer journeys feature available Teams that need governance, permissions, and advanced analytics feature available Businesses where marketing ROI is business-critical Upgrade to Enterprise when: feature available You need multi-touch revenue attribution feature available You manage multiple teams, brands, or regions feature available Executives or investors expect clear ROI reporting HubSpot Credits: Fuel powerful features that scale work at your own pace HubSpot has powerful tools that scale work alongside your teams. You can take advantage of these tools with HubSpot Credits—a simple, flexible way to pay for what you use. Simple Get started fast and test the latest AI tools with included credits. See credit balance, track usage, and more—all in a single workspace. Report on exactly which tools are delivering the most value. Flexible Easily plan your spend with credit packs, or enable pay as you go. Add more packs, adjust your spend cap, or pause features—staying in control without disruption. Use arrow keys to see other items AI Agents Customer Agent Resolves inquiries with fast, accurate responses — and escalates when needed, so your team can focus on complex cases and building loyalty. Learn more 65%+ of conversations resolved automatically 39% faster ticket resolution vs. teams not using customer agent Generate More Qualified Leads Turn anonymous website visitors into qualified opportunities with forms and dynamic CTAs that capture more leads worth talking to. Forms Capture higher-quality leads instantly with intelligent forms that adapt to each visitor and feed directly into your unified customer data. Audience Segments Identify and target anonymous website visitors based on both fit and intent. Breeze Customer Agent Drive marketing engagement with an AI agent that captures visitor interest, guides visitors to relevant resources, and converts traffic into sales-ready leads. Social Media Management Transform scattered social conversations into meaningful customer relationships with a unified inbox. Automate Your Marketing to Boost Campaign Efficiency Put tedious marketing tasks on autopilot while your team focuses on strategy and creative breakthroughs that actually move the needle. Marketing Studio Build marketing campaigns from one AI-powered workspace that unifies planning, creation, and execution. AI-Powered Emails Automate manual email work and deliver 1:1 personalized content at scale using CRM data. Personalization Manage website personalization with unified tools that scale tailored content and boost conversions. Lookalike Lists Find high-potential prospects within your contact lists. Showcase ROI With Strategic Reporting Prove exactly which marketing efforts drive revenue with precise attribution that shows where to invest next for maximum impact. Marketing Analytics Measure performance for marketing campaigns with built-in analytics, reports, and dashboards. Dashboards and Reporting Empower your team with insights from expert-level analytics, backed by easy-to-use reporting tools. Advanced Marketing Reporting Engage customers and drive growth with multi-touch revenue attribution and customer journey analytics reporting tools. Pathfinder Analyze your customer journey data to pinpoint where visitors are ready to convert, so you can place the right touchpoints at the moments that matter most. ROI Calculator View your investment impact with HubSpot ROI feature available Marketing Leads feature available Website Visitors feature available Deals Created feature available Revenue Generated Calculate your ROI 167% increase in website traffic after 6 months 3x increase in inbound leads after 6 months 83% of users increase conversion rates Need help choosing a plan?
